title: Translations of the patient-facing plain-language layer (per-language oncologist/advocate + native-speaker review; only after M5; HIGH tier)
context: After the patient-facing plain-language layer is published (M5, tasks 015-016), translations into additional languages may be produced so that non-English-speaking patients and advocates can access the educational summaries. This is a backlog/future task, deferred until M5 is complete. Each language requires its own oncologist/advocate review and a native-speaker accuracy check, because medical and scientific plain-language translation introduces language-specific risks. No target languages are specified yet.
objective: Translate the oncologist- and advocate-signed-off patient-facing plain-language summaries (015) into additional languages, with per-language review: a medically-qualified native speaker (or oncologist) verifies clinical accuracy in the target language, a patient advocate or community representative verifies plain-language faithfulness and that nothing reads as a recommendation in that language, and a native-speaker editor verifies linguistic accuracy. All translations carry the 'not medical advice' notice in the target language.
acceptanceCriteria: Task does not start until M5 (tasks 015 and 016) is complete and both oncologist and advocate sign-offs are recorded for the English source

Each translated language has its own review: a medically-qualified reviewer (oncologist or equivalent) confirms clinical accuracy in the target language; a patient advocate or community representative confirms plain-language faithfulness and that nothing reads as a recommendation
A native-speaker editor reviews each translation for linguistic accuracy and natural readability
All translated pages carry the 'not medical advice' notice translated accurately into the target language
Translated content is version-scoped to the English source version it was derived from; if the English source is updated, translations are flagged for re-review
No translation is published without all per-language review sign-offs recorded in the reviewers ledger
output: Translated versions of the patient-facing plain-language summaries in one or more additional languages, each with per-language oncologist/advocate and native-speaker review sign-offs recorded — extending educational access to non-English-speaking patients and advocates.
